mapper.sql: RequestNo, ItemNo, CustomerCode, AcceptCustomerCode, JPKOGO, JPKOGOItem, RequestModel, RequestQty, IssueDate, InstrType, DlvyWay, JPOrderNo, JPItemNo, JPShelfNo, GateNo, ZoneMark, JPRemarks, Accepter, RequestType, SortNo, ReqDlvyDate, BagType, BagFixedQty, BoxFixedQty, BoxType, SimpleModel, PackType, GreenMark, JPSerialNoMark, Midsize, prodflag, CustomerNo, UserNo, UserName, OptCode, ContractNo, ContractRemnant, SalesInfoNo, InDate_theory, RcvOrd_Date, BeginProduce_date, InDate_InFact, Exp_date, Export_Flag, Holon_Name, ShippingLabelNo, RequestModelRight, IssueID
mapper.select:
select
distinct
from dbo.TempRequisition
order by ${orderByClause}
mapper.insert: insert into dbo.TempRequisition (RequestNo, ItemNo, CustomerCode, AcceptCustomerCode, JPKOGO, JPKOGOItem, RequestModel, RequestQty, IssueDate, InstrType, DlvyWay, JPOrderNo, JPItemNo, JPShelfNo, GateNo, ZoneMark, JPRemarks, Accepter, RequestType, SortNo, ReqDlvyDate, BagType, BagFixedQty, BoxFixedQty, BoxType, SimpleModel, PackType, GreenMark, JPSerialNoMark, Midsize, prodflag, RequestModelRight, IssueID ) values (#{requestno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{itemno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{customercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{acceptcustomercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jpkogo,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, mapper.update:
update dbo.TempRequisition
RequestNo = #{record.requestno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ItemNo = #{record.itemno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CustomerCode = #{record.customercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AcceptCustomerCode = #{record.acceptcustomercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPKOGO = #{record.jpkogo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPKOGOItem = #{record.jpkogoitem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RequestModel = #{record.requestmodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RequestQty = #{record.requestqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
IssueDate = #{record.issuedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
InstrType = #{record.instrtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvyWay = #{record.dlvyway,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPOrderNo = #{record.jporderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPItemNo = #{record.jpitemno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPShelfNo = #{record.jpshelfno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
GateNo = #{record.gateno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ZoneMark = #{record.zonemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPRemarks = #{record.jpremarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Accepter = #{record.accepter,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RequestType = #{record.requesttype,jdbcType=TINYINT},
SortNo = #{record.sortno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ReqDlvyDate = #{record.reqdlvydate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BagType = #{record.bagtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BagFixedQty = #{record.bagfixedqty,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
BoxFixedQty = #{record.boxfixedqty,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
BoxType = #{record.boxtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SimpleModel = #{record.simplemodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PackType = #{record.packtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
GreenMark = #{record.greenmark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPSerialNoMark = #{record.jpserialnomark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Midsize = #{record.midsize,jdbcType=CHAR},
prodflag = #{record.prodflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
CustomerNo = #{record.customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
UserNo = #{record.userno,jdbcType=CHAR},
UserName = #{record.username,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptCode = #{record.optcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
ContractNo = #{record.contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContractRemnant = #{record.contractremnant,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
SalesInfoNo = #{record.salesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InDate_theory = #{record.indateTheory,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RcvOrd_Date = #{record.rcvordDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BeginProduce_date = #{record.beginproduceDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
InDate_InFact = #{record.indateInfact,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Exp_date = #{record.expDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Export_Flag = #{record.exportFlag,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Holon_Name = #{record.holonName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ShippingLabelNo = #{record.shippinglabelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
RequestModelRight = #{record.requestmodelright,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IssueID = #{record.issueid,jdbcType=BIGINT},

update dbo.TempRequisition
CustomerCode = #{customercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
AcceptCustomerCode = #{acceptcustomercode,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPKOGO = #{jpkogo,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPKOGOItem = #{jpkogoitem,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RequestModel = #{requestmodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RequestQty = #{requestqty,jdbcType=INTEGER},
IssueDate = #{issuedate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
InstrType = #{instrtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
DlvyWay = #{dlvyway,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPOrderNo = #{jporderno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPItemNo = #{jpitemno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPShelfNo = #{jpshelfno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
GateNo = #{gateno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ZoneMark = #{zonemark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPRemarks = #{jpremarks,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Accepter = #{accepter,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
RequestType = #{requesttype,jdbcType=TINYINT},
SortNo = #{sortno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ReqDlvyDate = #{reqdlvydate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BagType = #{bagtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
BagFixedQty = #{bagfixedqty,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
BoxFixedQty = #{boxfixedqty,jdbcType=NUMERIC},
BoxType = #{boxtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
SimpleModel = #{simplemodel,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
PackType = #{packtype,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
GreenMark = #{greenmark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
JPSerialNoMark = #{jpserialnomark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Midsize = #{midsize,jdbcType=CHAR},
prodflag = #{prodflag,jdbcType=CHAR},
CustomerNo = #{customerno,jdbcType=CHAR},
UserNo = #{userno,jdbcType=CHAR},
UserName = #{username,jdbcType=CHAR},
OptCode = #{optcode,jdbcType=CHAR},
ContractNo = #{contractno,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ContractRemnant = #{contractremnant,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
SalesInfoNo = #{salesinfono,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
InDate_theory = #{indateTheory,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
RcvOrd_Date = #{rcvordDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
BeginProduce_date = #{beginproduceDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
InDate_InFact = #{indateInfact,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Exp_date = #{expDate,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Export_Flag = #{exportFlag,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
Holon_Name = #{holonName,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
ShippingLabelNo = #{shippinglabelno,jdbcType=NVARCHAR},
RequestModelRight = #{requestmodelright,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
IssueID = #{issueid,jdbcType=BIGINT},
where RequestNo = #{requestno,jdbcType=VARCHAR} and ItemNo = #{itemno,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
